title: centrolepis humillima
intro: Centrolepis humillima, also known as the small shore buttons or swamp buttons, is a species of flowering plant in the family Centrolepidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centrolepis humillima include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Centrolepis humillima is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
